description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On 03/30/2026 at approximately 11:46 a.m., Vehicle 1 was involved in a rear-end collision while traveling straight in the second lane from 
the left on Coleman Avenue at the intersection with Newhall Drive in San Jose, CA. Vehicle 1 was operating in autonomous mode and had 
come to a complete stop at a red traffic signal when it was struck from the rear.
Vehicle 2, a white 2012 Chevrolet Colorado pickup truck, failed to stop and collided with the rear of Vehicle 1. Following the impact, the 
driver of Vehicle 1 disengaged autonomous mode.
Both parties then relocated to a safe location on W. Hedding Street in San Jose, CA, where they exchanged information and inspected the 
vehicles. Visible damage to both vehicles appeared minor. Vehicle 1 sustained a minor scratch to the rear bumper, and Vehicle 2 sustained a 
minor scratch to the front bumper.
No injuries were reported by either party, and no emergency services were requested.
Print
Clear Form
